name: cklph
description: Peter's personal Claude OS marketplace — authoritative skills, hooks, agents, and conventions.

plugins.name: cklph-os
plugins.description: Peter's personal Claude OS — authoritative skills, hooks, and conventions.

plugins.name: cklph-nextjs
plugins.description: Peter's opinionated Next.js + Supabase patterns. House style on top of the framework, complements vercel:* skills.

plugins.name: cklph-architect
plugins.description: Peter's value-based consultancy practice. Discover, scope, propose, price, position, shape engagements. Codifies the discipline; no IP republished.

plugins.name: cklph-eos
plugins.description: Peter's business operating cadence. Quarterly priorities, weekly sync structure, scorecard, issues resolution, people-fit, accountability mapping. Codifies the discipline; no branded IP republished.

plugins.name: cklph-wp
plugins.description: Drive WordPress from Claude Code via wp-cli over SSH — connection to managed hosts (Flywheel/WP Engine/generic), posts/meta/options/media, and the hard-won hosting gotchas. Foundation for cklph-elementor and cklph-figma-to-wp.

plugins.name: cklph-elementor
plugins.description: Read and write Elementor page/template data programmatically — the _elementor_data model, the CSS/responsive gotchas, theme-builder templates + conditions, and the global Kit. Builds on cklph-wp.

plugins.name: cklph-figma
plugins.description: Read designs from the Figma MCP — design context, screenshots, structure metadata, and design tokens (colors, type, spacing). The design-source layer for any Figma-to-code work.

plugins.name: cklph-visual-qa
plugins.description: Verify a rendered web page VISUALLY against a design — headless-Chrome screenshots + ImageMagick crop/compare, overflow probes, and the adversarial visual-reviewer. Framework-agnostic; pairs with cklph-figma.

plugins.name: cklph-figma-to-wp
plugins.description: Orchestrate the full Figma to WordPress/Elementor pipeline: read the design, learn existing-page conventions, tokenize, generate Elementor JSON, write to a draft, and visually verify against Figma. Thin glue over cklph-figma, cklph-elementor, cklph-wp, and cklph-visual-qa.
